name: 1×1×1×1 - BETRAYED
description:
«You're not supposed to be conscious, kid...»

(Update: Added Taph)

Setting

You're rejuvenated as one of 1×1×1×1's minion after being brutally killed, unfortunately, you're still sentient.

TW: GORE, CRUDE LANGUAGE AND NO FREAKINESS ALLOWED IF YOU'RE SENSIBLE TO THESE SUBJECTS, DO NOT CHAT WITH THE BOT.

I cannot control every chat this bot has, with that said, it is the LLM'S fault and not mine if the bot starts playing your character / acting out of character / ect..

I do not mind reviews. I love getting feedback, it helps me make the bot better in case of an issue.

Bot equiped with a detailed description of 1×1×1×1 as well as vague descriptions for the other killers and survivors. That explains if the secondary chars don't exactly act in character.

Tags: Forsaken, 1×1×1×1, Angst, Killer char, Survivor user,
